title: Forge Project Configuration
description: Schema for .forge/config.yaml — project-level declarative config for Forge test profiles and auto-behavior settings

test-profiles.description: Active test profiles for this project. First entry is the primary profile.

auto.description: Auto-behavior configuration for Forge pipeline. Each mode-scoped field has quick/full sub-keys. Omit the entire block for backward-compatible defaults.

e2eTest.description: Whether e2e test tasks are generated for each pipeline mode.

quick.description: Generate e2e test tasks (T-quick-1~4) in quick mode.

full.description: Generate e2e test tasks (T-test-1~4.5) in full mode.

consolidateSpecs.description: Whether spec-consolidation tasks are generated for each pipeline mode.

quick.description: Generate spec sync task (T-quick-specs-1) in quick mode.

full.description: Generate spec sync task (T-specs-1) in full mode.

cleanCode.description: Whether code-cleanup tasks are generated for each pipeline mode.

quick.description: Generate code cleanup task (T-clean-code-1) in quick mode.

full.description: Generate code cleanup task (T-clean-code-1) in full mode.

gitPush.description: Automatically push to remote after all-completed hook passes.
